claim_boundary: Privacy-safe actor-role split for the Kenyan community-pool cohort. Producer wallets are unique KES/KSh voucher tokens; accepted-voucher members are pool membership slots. Stable external users exclude addresses linked to cohort voucher issuer targets where metadata is available, so producer/consumer separation is conservative.
